+64494*G*x^23-35868*G*x^22+12996*G*x^21-2730*G*x^20+1170*G*x^19-1440*G*x^18+990*G*x^17-366*G*x^16+72*G*x^15-6*G*x^14+x^36-18*x^35+147*x^34-726*x^33+2442*x^32-5988*x^31+11232*x^30-16770*x^29+20595*x^28-21200*x^27+18216*x^26-12750*x^25+7179*x^24-3612*x^23+2244*x^22-1782*x^21+1236*x^20-606*x^19+193*x^18-36*x^17+3*x^16)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
